expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: The top category strip is cut off on the right, with the 'Hot Games' pill partially visible and the row extending beyond the screen.
Several game tiles in the featured sections are partially cropped on the right edge, making some cards unreadable/incomplete.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game row, obscuring part of the content near the bottom of the screen.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a responsible gaming icon or its absence from the top nav bar; all reported issues describe layout/cropping problems with game tiles and navigation overlap.
